name: /operator-namespace-init refuses to overwrite an existing operator namespace folder by default
command: mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org && printf 'rules: []\n' > generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org/conventions.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/operator-namespace-init.sh" my-org --root generated-code-quality-standards 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'already_exists' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
